nodes.name: Southern brown-throated weaver
nodes.summary: Southern brown-throated weaver（Ploceus xanthopterus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Southern brown-throated weaver。

nodes.name: Ploceus
nodes.summary: Ploceus（Ploceus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联64种鸟类，如Yellow-legged weaver、Black-chinned weaver、Bannerman's weaver等64种鸟类。

nodes.name: Southern brown-throated weaver
nodes.summary: The southern brown-throated weaver (Ploceus xanthopterus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in southern Africa. Gallery References External links Southern brown-throated weaver - Species text in Weaver Watch. Southern brown-throated weaver - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
nodes.shortSummary: The southern brown-throated weaver (Ploceus xanthopterus) is a species of bird in the family Ploceidae. It is found in southern Africa.
